Adding --disable-radix is needed for Deepseek models to use fmha.

There is no need to run self.update_status(bootstrap_room, KVPoll.WaitingForInput) in each add_transfer_request call, when a request leave the bootstrap queue, it has already been marked as the KVPoll.WaitingForInput status, so we should stop setting this.

sglang.title: Add triton fused moe kernel config for E=257 on B200
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
After #6736, the default number of experts for DeepSeek-V3 changes from 264 to 257, which causes the performance of fused_moe kernel to decrease.
This PR tunes the kernel of E=257 on B200

Modifications

Adding config file.
Benchmark diff:
SGLANG_ENABLE_FLASHINFER_GEMM=1 python3 -m sglang

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
CompilationConfig repr initially works but when model compilation runs, it gets dynamically updated with a PostGradPassManager object:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/vllm/compilation/backends.py#L368-L384
This object is not json serializable and causes repr to error out.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Core] Update cancellation logic in `generate()` to handle Generator exits
vllm.author: Adolfo-Karim
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Signed-off-by: Adolfo Victoria adovi@meta.com
Handle GeneratorExit exceptions in AsyncLLM.generate() to properly abort requests when generators are garbage collected or closed without cancellation. GeneratorExit is a BaseException (not Exception), bypassing our current catch-all error handl

vllm.title: [Core] Fix abrupt request abort
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt: There's currently an issue when a KV Connector is in use and requests are aborted before they have been scheduled (and so before any blocks have been allocated in the kv cache manager). The scheduler _connector_finished method is invoked and it calls kv_cache_manager.get_block_ids(request_id) which

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix tpu_model_runner block_id concatenation
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This was an oversight when adding support for multiple kv cache groups. The inner block_id lists should be extended, not the outer per-cache group list.
This had been done correctly in gpu_model_runner but I've also updated that to use zip for consistency.

vllm.title: [TPU][Test] Add script to run benchmark on TPU for buildkite
vllm.author: QiliangCui
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add scripts to run benchmark on TPU.
The goal is to catch regression in early stage.
The script

build an image.
start docker on the image.
inside the docker, start vllm and run benchmark
check the throughput and error if it is lower than expected.

Next step is to enable the test in ci-infra branch

vllm.title: Add FlexAttention to V1
vllm.author: drisspg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR adds FlexAttention as a new unified_attention backend for the V1 engine.
This requires torch > 2.7 since we fixed a number of dynamic shapes issues that show up by default here.
Design
FlexAttention is broken up into two distinct phases, block mask creation and the call to forward. F
